chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 479 of 2005 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.3800/2009 (C/A) 10.09.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. This case was lastly fixed on 03.12.2014, where after no efforts have been made to have the matter fixed. The petitioner is aggrieved on some encroachment actions taken against his house in the year 2005 and probably with the passage of time has lost relevancy; hence, no one has proceeded with the matter. The contempt application is thus dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
